name: Pears Melba
recipeIngredient: 1 Pint Ice Cream (e.g., vanilla, toasted almond, pear)
1 Pint Raspberries, pureed with 2 Tablespoons Sugar
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel, core, and halve the pears.
2. In a saucepan, combine sugar, water, lemon peel, vanilla, sweet wine, and dry wine. Bring to a boil over medium heat.
3. Continue boiling for 3 minutes until the mixture thickens slightly.
4. Add the pears to the pan and simmer gently for about 15-20 minutes or until tender and infused with the sauce.
5. Remove the pears from the pan using tongs, allowing them to cool in the sauce.
6. Reduce the sauce over medium heat until it becomes very syrupy.
7. In individual serving bowls, spoon a layer of sauce at the bottom.
8. Place a scoop of ice cream on top of the sauce.
9. Add a poached pear on top of the ice cream.
10. Drizzle with the pureed raspberries and serve.
Serves 8.
Per Serving: 225 calories, 2 g protein, 36 g carbohydrate, 6 g fat (4 g saturated), 22 mg cholesterol, 29 mg sodium, 4 g fiber.
